hero.title: Digital designs
hero.subtitle: ShapeBazaar is where digital designs become real products. Designers, manufacturers and users meet on one platform.

howItWorks.pageSubtitle: From design to product in ShapeBazaar takes just 4 steps.
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: 4 steps from idea to product
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse from thousands of 3D models or upload your own STL/OBJ/3MF file.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose size, color, and material. See the price instantly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Secure Iyzico payment. Your nearest print partner gets the order immediately.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Delivered to your door in 3–5 business days. Track your order in real-time.

roles.title: Everyone wins
roles.subtitle: Designers earn. Manufacturers earn. Users win.

designer.title: I'm a Designer
designer.desc: Upload your model, license it and earn points on every sale. Your designs get printed worldwide.

printer.title: I'm a Print Partner
printer.desc: Get approved and claim jobs from the order pool. Put your idle printer to work.

buyer.title: I need a product
buyer.desc: Sign up or browse as a guest. See it in 3D, configure it, get it delivered.

values.title: Our company values
values.subtitle: The principles that bring ShapeBazaar together

manifesto.quote: "Every idea starts with a shape. We believe designs should leave the file and find their place in the physical world."
manifesto.sub: Because every model deserves to be printed, every design deserves to be shared, every idea deserves to come to life.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: ShapeBazaar is a platform where digital designs become real products. Founded in 2024, our project brings together designers, manufacturers, and users under one roof to revolutionize the 3D printing industry.
about.vision_desc: To democratize design and enable every idea to find physical form in the real world.
about.team_desc: Built by Turkey's finest software developers, designers, and entrepreneurs.

mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.missionDesc: To provide the tools needed for every designer to monetize their talent, every manufacturer to utilize their capacity, and every customer to realize their dreams.
mission.visionDesc: To build a global 3D printing network starting from Turkey. To create an ecosystem operated openly and fairly, without central control, where design, production, and consumption are all decentralized.
mission.value1Desc: Equal opportunities and transparent pricing for all parties.
mission.value2Desc: We grow together. We aim for a network, not a single player.
mission.value3Desc: High standards at every stage of design, production, and delivery.
mission.value4Desc: Making 3D printing technology accessible and economical.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Latest news, guides, and success stories
blog.noContent: Articles coming soon. Don't forget to follow us!

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions? Don't hesitate to reach out to us. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
contact.formError: An error occurred. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ShapeBazaar ("we", "us", or "Company"), we respect your privacy.
privacy.section1Content: When you register and use our services, we collect: name, email address, phone number, payment information, 3D design files, and order history.
privacy.section2Content: We use collected data to provide, improve, and analyze our services, and to comply with legal obligations.
privacy.section3Content: Your data is protected through encrypted connections and secure servers. However, no system is 100% secure.
privacy.section4Content: Our platform uses cookies to improve user experience.
privacy.section5Content: Under GDPR regulations, you have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using ShapeBazaar, you accept these terms and conditions.
terms.section1Content: ShapeBazaar is a platform that converts 3D designs into printed products. Designers, manufacturers, and customers can conduct transactions within this ecosystem.
terms.section2Content: Users are responsible for ensuring that uploaded designs do not infringe copyrights and that they do not use the platform for illegal purposes.
terms.section3Content: All payments are made through secure payment methods. Orders cannot be cancelled once confirmed.
terms.section4Content: If there is a defect in the product within 30 days, replacement or refund is available.
terms.section5Content: ShapeBazaar cannot be held responsible for direct or indirect damages arising from its services.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: ShapeBazaar uses cookies to improve our platform and enhance user experience.
cookies.section1Content: Cookies are small text files stored by your browser. They are used to remember preferences and user choices.
cookies.section2Content: Essential cookies: For proper functionality. Analytics cookies: To understand traffic. Marketing cookies: To optimize ad delivery.
cookies.section3Content: You can control cookies through your browser settings. However, this may affect platform functionality.
cookies.section4Content: Services like Google Analytics and Stripe may also use cookies.

becomePartner.title: Become a Partner
becomePartner.subtitle: Join ShapeBazaar and grow your business
becomePartner.description: Add your 3D printers to the ShapeBazaar ecosystem. Get jobs from the order pool, earn from every print.

benefits.title: Earn from every print
benefits.desc: Get points in your wallet for every completed order.

benefits.title: Flexible work
benefits.desc: Take the orders you want, work whenever you want.

benefits.title: Secure payment
benefits.desc: Payments are protected through the platform.

benefits.title: Monetize your capacity
benefits.desc: Turn your idle printers into a revenue source.

partner.formDescription: Fill in your information completely, we will respond within 2-3 business days.
partner.doneDescription: Our team will review your application and contact you via email within 2-3 business days. After approval, you will have access to the order pool.
partner.deadlineWarning: Warning: Your deadline is approaching! The order will automatically return to the pool when time runs out.
partner.cargoSub: Enter shipping details to complete the order.
partner.pageSubtitle: Join the ShapeBazaar ecosystem with your 3D printer. Claim jobs from the order pool and earn on every print.
partner.earnDesc: Points are added to your wallet for every completed order.
partner.flexibleDesc: Pick the orders you want, work whenever you want.
partner.secureDesc: All payments are guaranteed through the platform.
partner.capacityDesc: Turn your idle printer into a source of income.
partner.formSubtitle: Fill in all details and we'll get back to you within 2-3 business days.
partner.doneDesc: Our team will review your application and get back to you via email within 2-3 business days.
